title.en: China-to-Lebanon Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入黎巴嫩：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入黎巴嫩：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Lebanon LIBNOR conformity expectations, EDL and LCEC solar / net-metering context, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 grid-interface requirements, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 220/380 V 50 Hz settings, and Lebanon's off-grid / hybrid rooftop solar reality — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与黎巴嫩LIBNOR合格评定要求、EDL及LCEC太阳能/净计量背景、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口要求、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据、220/380 V 50 Hz参数，以及黎巴嫩离网/混合式屋顶光伏现实——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與黎巴嫩LIBNOR合格評定要求、EDL及LCEC太陽能/淨計量背景、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727併網介面要求、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據、220/380 V 50 Hz參數，以及黎巴嫩離網/混合式屋頂光伏現實——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, LIBNOR conformity scope determination, EDL grid-connection approval, LCEC net-metering eligibility decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Lebanese standards, product-specific LIBNOR conformity requirements, EDL interconnection conditions, LCEC solar and net-metering guidance, customs practice, and project-owner requirements with qualified Lebanese professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、LIBNOR合格评定范围裁定、EDL并网批准、LCEC净计量资格决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格的黎巴嫩专业人士核验现行黎巴嫩标准、具体产品的LIBNOR合格评定要求、EDL接入条件、LCEC太阳能及净计量指引、海关实践及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、LIBNOR合格評定範圍裁定、EDL併網批准、LCEC淨計量資格決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格的黎巴嫩專業人士核驗現行黎巴嫩標準、具體產品的LIBNOR合格評定要求、EDL接入條件、LCEC太陽能及淨計量指引、海關實務及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Lebanon, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirming whether the exact inverter, bundled electrical accessories, or import package is subject to LIBNOR conformity or Lebanese standard adoption, often through NL standards aligned with IEC; (2) keeping model-specific IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence instead of relying only on China GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 files; (3) documenting IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence for any grid-interactive or net-metered EDL/LCEC project; (4) supplying IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence; and (5) validating 220/380 V, 50 Hz settings. Because Lebanon's state grid supply has been highly constrained, many rooftop systems are private off-grid or hybrid solar-plus-battery installations rather than formal EDL net-metering projects. In those cases, importer / installer due diligence, LIBNOR conformity status, insurance, and project-owner requirements dominate, while China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence should be treated as China-side baseline evidence only.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口黎巴嫩时，主要实际差距包括：（1）确认具体逆变器、随附电气配件或进口套装是否受LIBNOR合格评定或黎巴嫩标准采纳范围管辖，黎巴嫩NL标准常采用或对齐IEC；（2）保留特定型号的IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据，而非仅依赖中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004文件；（3）对于任何并网互动或净计量的EDL/LCEC项目，准备IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727并网接口证据；（4）提交IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据；（5）验证220/380 V、50 Hz参数。由于黎巴嫩国家电网供电长期受限，许多屋顶系统是私人离网或太阳能加电池混合系统，而非正式EDL净计量项目。在这些情形下，进口商/安装商尽调、LIBNOR合格评定状态、保险和项目业主要求占主导；中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据只能视为中国侧基准证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口黎巴嫩時，主要實際差距包括：（1）確認具體逆變器、隨附電氣配件或進口套裝是否受LIBNOR合格評定或黎巴嫩標準採納範圍管轄，黎巴嫩NL標準常採用或對齊IEC；（2）保留特定型號的IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據，而非僅依賴中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004文件；（3）對於任何併網互動或淨計量的EDL/LCEC項目，準備IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727併網介面證據；（4）提交IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據；（5）驗證220/380 V、50 Hz參數。由於黎巴嫩國家電網供電長期受限，許多屋頂系統是私人離網或太陽能加電池混合系統，而非正式EDL淨計量項目。在這些情形下，進口商/安裝商盡調、LIBNOR合格評定狀態、保險和項目業主要求占主導；中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據只能視為中國側基準證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
